idea-plugin.name: Carve
idea-plugin.description:
Carve markup language support for JetBrains IDEs.

Features

  • Syntax highlighting via TextMate grammar
  • Language Server features via the bundled carve-lsp server (LSP4IJ): diagnostics, completion, code folding, structure/outline, hover, quick fixes/intentions, rename, formatting, and semantic highlighting (requires Node.js)
  • Live preview panel (split editor view)
  • IDE theme sync - preview follows dark/light mode
  • Export to HTML
  • Live templates for quick element insertion (type c + Tab to see all)
  • File type recognition for .crv

About Carve

Carve is a post-Markdown lightweight markup language that builds on Djot with visual mnemonics (/italic/, *bold*, _underline_, ~strike~, =highlight=) and a Markdown-like reading flow.

More info: github.com/markup-carve/carve
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.1.1

  • LSP support (LSP4IJ) backed by the bundled carve-lsp server: diagnostics, completion, code folding, structure/outline + breadcrumbs, hover, quick fixes/intentions (Djot/Markdown to Carve), rename, formatting, semantic highlighting, and code lenses. Requires Node.js on the PATH (or set in Settings | Tools | Carve).
  • Preview renders the full extension set: code groups/tabs, inline and block spoilers, Mermaid diagrams, Chart.js charts, and code-block language badges and filename headers - all re-rendering live as you type.
  • Refreshed bundled carve-js renderer: list tables, math blocks, details/disclosure, and the latest core fixes.
  • Highlighting updated for the latest syntax: block headers ("...") and grouping labels ([...]) on code fences and ::: divs, and GFM |---| delimiter rows.
  • Minimum supported IDE raised to 2024.3 (build 243); 2024.1 and 2024.2 are no longer supported.
  • Fixed: chl/csub live templates inserted doubled delimiters; corrected to the canonical single =/,.
  • Fixed: preview no longer raises a threading error when editing or pasting.
  • Modernized deprecated platform API usage.

0.1.0

Initial release.

  • Syntax highlighting via TextMate grammar
  • Live preview panel with IDE theme sync and code highlighting
  • Export to HTML
  • Live templates for Carve's visual mnemonics
  • File type recognition for .crv
  • carve-js (bundled, GraalJS) and carve-php preview renderers
  • Custom preview CSS

server.name: Carve Language Server
server.description: Carve markup language server (diagnostics, completion, folding, outline, code actions).
